nasb.text: They have cut down her forest,” declares the Lord; “Surely it will no more be found, Even though they are now more numerous than locusts And are without number.

esv.text: They shall cut down her forest, declares the Lord, though it is impenetrable, because they are more numerous than locusts; they are without number.

cnv.text: 他們要砍伐它的森林。 這是耶和華的宣告； 它的森林雖然茂密難以通過， 但敵人比蝗蟲還多，無法數算。

ccb.text: 埃及的人口虽然稠密如林， 敌军必像无数的蝗虫一样扫平他们。 这是耶和华说的。
